title: End Portal Ender Chests
description: Adds the end portal effect to the inside of ender chests.
body:
With this pack, the end portal effect is applied to the inside of ender chests, truly putting the 'end' in ender chest.
As this pack uses vanilla shaders, Optifine isn't required, and be warned; Optifine/Iris shaders will break the effect.
